_comment: Curated allow-list for the VERIFIED n8n node. Keys are resource tags; values are an array of operationIds to keep, or "*" for all ops in that tag. Anything not listed is dropped at build time. n8n verifies curated single-vendor nodes (SerpApi ~37 ops, ScrapingBee ~17) — a 430-op node is too sprawling to review. Tune this list to grow the node by demand; the full surface stays available via `CURATE=0 npm run gen`. See webscraping-fe docs/n8n-verified-node-packaging-plan-2026-06.md.
